version.description: Checkpoint format version for forward compatibility

lastProcessedRevisionFolder.description: Relative path of last successfully processed revision folder (canonical format)

lastCompletedStage.description: Stage that completed for lastProcessedRevisionFolder; resume begins from next stage

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when checkpoint was last updated

totalWorkItemsProcessed.description: Cumulative count of unique work items processed (reset on restart)

totalRevisionsApplied.description: Cumulative count of revisions applied (CreatedOrUpdated + AppliedFields stages completed)

totalLinksApplied.description: Cumulative count of links applied (AppliedLinks stage completed)

totalAttachmentsUploaded.description: Cumulative count of attachments uploaded (UploadedAttachments stage completed)

totalEmbeddedImagesReplayed.description: Cumulative count of embedded images replayed (UploadedAttachments stage completed)

totalRevisionsSkipped.description: Cumulative count of revisions skipped (e.g., RevisionReplay=false)

jobConfigurationHash.description: Hash of job configuration at checkpoint creation; mismatch indicates config change since checkpoint

errorMessage.description: Optional error message if reason is Error or Interrupted
